subject: Re: Sample Data import step to relion
body:
Hi Alejandro,

Warp 2.0 writes out particles/metadata compatible with RELION 5 - please
try that instead :-)

Cheers,

Alister

On Wed, 13 Nov 2024 at 09:34, 'Alejandro Villalta Casares' via Warp <
warp-em@googlegroups.com> wrote:

> Hi,
> I'm trying to use the samle data on warp to learn how to use it. I managed
> to arrive at the step I need to use the .star file into relion but when I
> try to to either InitialModel or Refine3D job. I have this error:
> ERROR:
> BUG: cannot find name for particle...
>
> I'm using relion 4.0.1 and warp 2.0
>
> Thank you,
>
> Alejandro Villalta
>
>
